Note: There are many problems with the baro readings.  On Mar 15 2000, he changes to the aneroid barometer.
On August 24 at 1300 he switched back to the mercury barometer.
While using the aneroid barometer, he records the mercury barometer readings at the end of each
watch in the Event area. When he switches back to the mercury barometer, he records the aneroid
values at the end of each watch in the Event area until September 27.
I transcribed the mercury and aneroid values from the Event areas into their own columns.
the original baro column was a mix of the two barometers, so I chose to save those values in the
Baro Orig column, and I replaced the aneroid values in the Baro column with the mercury baro
values. At least all the values in the baro column are from a mercury barometer. Feel free to replace
them with the Baro Orig values.
